case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. RANGER INSURANCE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE CO. DE SOTO BAIL BONDS $11,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,580.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
